steps.summary: Implemented runtime evidence loader in kifrs/runtime/evidence.py. load_runtime_evidence validates source/evidence manifests first, returns immutable EvidenceBundle/RuntimeEvidence objects, groups supporting_interpretation/legal_boundary/fact_evidence by role, exposes safe reference dicts without record payload, and raises ValueError on invalid evidence. Tests cover default load, role grouping, safe reference dict, and invalid evidence failure.

Added optional external evidence panel to 1116/1109/1115 review packs. kifrs/runtime/evidence_panel.py renders role-separated safe references, generate_review_pack accepts evidence_bundle without changing existing calls, and tests verify Korean external evidence sections plus no copied source text.
